title: LLM-crawler posture (was jssm#862)
manager: Set the crawler posture — robots.txt and a sitemap tuned for LLM crawlers — so the model-facing content actually gets ingested (was jssm#862). It's the plumbing that decides whether all the llms.txt and reference work is reachable or silently blocked; getting it right is the difference between being crawled and being invisible.
